title: Listings grid renders property cards with required summary fields
description: Verifies the listings page shows a grid of cards and each card presents core summary information (image, title, location, rating, price).

steps.description: Verify element "listing card image" is visible
Verify element "listing card title" is visible
Verify element "listing card location" is visible
Verify element "listing card rating" is visible
Verify element "listing card price" is visible

title: Open listing detail modal from a card
description: Verifies clicking a listing card opens a detail modal showing images and the same key details.

steps.description: Verify element "listing detail modal" is visible
Verify element "listing detail modal image" is visible
Verify element "listing detail modal title" is visible
Verify element "listing detail modal location" is visible
Verify element "listing detail modal rating" is visible

title: Listing detail modal shows a price value
description: Verifies the listing detail modal includes a visible price for the selected listing.

steps.description: Verify element "listing detail modal" is visible
Verify element "listing detail modal price" is visible

title: Carousel dots on a listing card are present
description: Verifies image carousel dots render on listing cards (even though dot navigation is non-interactive).

title: Carousel dots do not change the card image (known non-interactive behavior)
description: Verifies clicking carousel dots does not change the displayed image on a listing card, matching the known limitation.

steps.description: Click on the first "carousel dot" on the first listing card
Verify element "listing card primary image" is visible
Click on a different "carousel dot" on the same listing card
Verify element "listing card primary image" is visible

title: Listings grid remains usable after scrolling (lazy loading not required)
description: Verifies that after scrolling down the page, listing cards are still visible and can be interacted with.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the listings grid
Verify element "listing detail modal" is visible

title: Filter listings by selecting a category chip
description: Selecting a category in the categories bar filters the listings grid to matching results.

steps.description: Click a category icon in the categories bar labeled "Beach"
Verify text "Beach" is visible in the categories bar as the selected category

title: Reset filter using All category
description: Clicking All resets the grid to show the unfiltered set of listings.

steps.description: Click a category icon in the categories bar labeled "Mountain"
Verify text "Mountain" is visible in the categories bar as the selected category
Click "All" to reset to all listings
Verify text "All" is visible in the categories bar as the selected category

title: Switch categories updates the grid each time
description: Switching from one category to another updates the listings grid accordingly.

steps.description: Click a category icon in the categories bar labeled "City"
Verify text "City" is visible in the categories bar as the selected category
Click a category icon in the categories bar labeled "Cabin"
Verify text "Cabin" is visible in the categories bar as the selected category

title: Category filter persists while staying on the page (no refresh)
description: After filtering, the user can scroll and continue browsing within the filtered results without the filter clearing.

steps.description: Click a category icon in the categories bar labeled "Beach"
Verify text "Beach" is visible in the categories bar as the selected category
Scroll to the bottom of the listings grid
Verify text "Beach" is visible in the categories bar as the selected category

title: Selecting the same category again does not break the grid
description: Clicking an already-selected category does not cause the listings grid to disappear or become unusable.

steps.description: Click a category icon in the categories bar labeled "Mountain"
Verify text "Mountain" is visible in the categories bar as the selected category
Click a category icon in the categories bar labeled "Mountain"

title: Empty results state when a category has no matching listings
description: If a selected category has no matches, the grid shows an empty state message rather than failing silently.

steps.description: Click a category icon in the categories bar that is expected to have no matching listings
Verify text "No listings found" is visible

title: Search returns matching listings and shows toast (using search button)
description: Verifies that searching with a valid keyword filters the listings grid and shows a toast containing the query.

steps.description: Verify element "Where search input" is visible
Verify text "beach" is visible in the toast notification

title: Search returns matching listings and shows toast (using Enter key)
description: Verifies that pressing Enter in the Where input triggers search, updates the grid, and shows a toast with the query.

steps.description: Verify element "Where search input" is visible
Verify text "mountain" is visible in the toast notification

title: Search is case-insensitive for matching and toast reflects typed query
description: Verifies that mixed-case input still returns results and the toast contains the query as entered.

steps.description: Verify element "Where search input" is visible
Verify text "PaRiS" is visible in the toast notification

title: Search with leading/trailing spaces still works and shows toast
description: Verifies that a query with extra whitespace triggers a search and the toast appears with the query string.

steps.description: Verify element "Where search input" is visible
Verify text "lake" is visible in the toast notification

title: No-results search shows empty state and toast with query
description: Verifies that a query with no matches results in no listings shown and a toast displays the searched query.

steps.description: Verify element "Where search input" is visible
Verify text "zzzz_nonexistent_place" is visible in the toast notification

title: Special characters in query do not break search and toast appears
description: Verifies that entering special characters triggers search behavior and still displays a toast containing the query.

steps.description: Verify element "Where search input" is visible
Verify text "@#&*" is visible in the toast notification

title: Consecutive searches update results and latest toast reflects newest query
description: Verifies that running a second search after the first updates the grid again and shows a new toast with the latest query.

steps.description: Verify element "Where search input" is visible
Verify text "city" is visible in the toast notification
Verify text "cabin" is visible in the toast notification

title: Open listing detail modal shows core listing information

Verify element "Listing location in modal" is visible
Verify element "Listing rating in modal" is visible

title: Modal displays host, description, and amenities sections
description: Verifies the modal includes host information, a description area, and an amenities list for a listing.

steps.description: Verify element "Listing detail modal" is visible

title: Reserve from modal triggers booking confirmation toast
description: Verifies that clicking Reserve in the modal shows a visible toast confirmation.

steps.description: Verify element "Listing detail modal" is visible
Verify element "Booking confirmation toast" is visible

title: Close modal using the X control
description: Verifies the modal can be dismissed via the close (X) control.

Click the "X" close control on the modal
Verify element "Listing detail modal" is not visible

title: Close modal by clicking the overlay/backdrop
description: Verifies the modal can be dismissed by clicking outside the modal on the overlay.

steps.description: Verify element "Listing detail modal" is visible
Click the modal overlay/backdrop outside the modal content
Verify element "Listing detail modal" is not visible

title: Reserve works after reopening the modal
description: Verifies that after closing and reopening a listing modal, Reserve still triggers a booking toast.

steps.description: Click the "X" close control on the modal
Verify element "Listing detail modal" is not visible
Verify element "Booking confirmation toast" is visible

title: Toast appears while modal remains open after Reserve
description: Verifies that clicking Reserve does not auto-close the modal and the toast is shown concurrently.

steps.description: Verify element "Listing detail modal" is visible
Verify element "Booking confirmation toast" is visible
Verify element "Listing detail modal" is visible

title: Like a listing shows liked state and 'Saved to wishlist' toast
description: Verifies that clicking a listing heart toggles to liked and displays the saved toast message.

steps.description: Verify element "a listing card" is visible
Click the heart button on a listing card
Verify element "the same listing card heart shows liked (red)" is visible
Verify text "Saved to wishlist" is visible

title: Unlike a previously liked listing shows unliked state and 'Removed from wishlist' toast
description: Verifies that clicking the heart again removes the like and shows the removed toast message.

steps.description: Click the heart button on a listing card
Verify element "the same listing card heart shows liked (red)" is visible
Click the heart button on the same listing card
Verify element "the same listing card heart shows unliked (white)" is visible
Verify text "Removed from wishlist" is visible

title: Liking one listing does not automatically like other listings
description: Verifies that the like state is isolated to the clicked listing card only.

steps.description: Verify element "multiple listing cards" is visible
Click the heart button on a listing card
Verify element "that listing card heart shows liked (red)" is visible
Verify element "a different listing card heart shows unliked (white)" is visible

title: Rapid double toggle ends in expected final state (like then unlike)
description: Verifies the UI can handle quick repeated clicks without leaving the heart in an inconsistent state.

steps.description: Click the heart button on a listing card
Click the heart button on the same listing card
Verify element "the same listing card heart shows unliked (white)" is visible
Verify text "Removed from wishlist" is visible

title: Wishlist like state is not persisted after page reload (known behavior)
description: Verifies that after reloading the page the previously liked heart returns to unliked state as sessions are not persisted.

steps.description: Click the heart button on a listing card
Verify element "the same listing card heart shows liked (red)" is visible
Verify element "the same listing card heart shows unliked (white)" is visible

title: Toast appears when saving to wishlist and is visible to the user
description: Verifies that the toast UI appears on save action (visibility-only check).

steps.description: Click the heart button on a listing card
Verify text "Saved to wishlist" is visible

title: Toast appears when removing from wishlist and is visible to the user
description: Verifies that the toast UI appears on remove action (visibility-only check).

steps.description: Click the heart button on a listing card
Click the heart button on the same listing card
Verify text "Removed from wishlist" is visible

Type "300" into the max price input field
Select "Entire" from the place type options

description: Verifies that using Clear all resets the filters and restores the grid to an unfiltered state after applying constraints.

steps.description: Type "150" into the min price input field
Type "200" into the max price input field

title: Close filters modal using the X control
description: Verifies that the modal can be dismissed via the close (X) control without applying changes.

Click the "X" close control on the modal

title: Invalid price range (min greater than max) results in empty results state

Type "100" into the max price input field

description: Verifies that selecting multiple amenities and applying filters updates the results and does not error.

steps.description: Type "99999" into the min price input field
Type "100000" into the max price input field

title: Successful booking request with date, duration, guests, and optional message
description: Verifies a user can complete a booking request and sees confirmation plus an updated price breakdown.

steps.description: Click on a guide card "View details" (or equivalent details control)
Select a date using the date picker
Click the "+" control to increase guests by 1
Type "Looking forward to a local food tour." into the message field
Verify text "Booking confirmed" or "Request sent" is visible

title: Price breakdown updates when switching duration options
description: Verifies the price breakdown visibly updates when changing duration selections.

steps.description: Click on a guide card "View details" (or equivalent details control)
Select a date using the date picker

title: Price breakdown updates when increasing and decreasing guests
description: Verifies the guest counter changes with +/- and the price breakdown remains visible and updates accordingly.

steps.description: Click on a guide card "View details" (or equivalent details control)
Select a date using the date picker
Click the "+" control to increase guests by 1
Click the "-" control to decrease guests by 1

title: Booking blocked when date is not selected
description: Verifies a validation error (or prompt) appears and booking is not submitted when requesting without a date.

Verify text "Select a date" or "Please choose a date" is visible
Verify text "Booking confirmed" or "Request sent" is not visible

title: Optional message is not required to submit booking
